Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your fleet system is accessible to drivers and managers anywhere, protects sensitive data under Singapore's PDPA rules, and connects seamlessly with your accounting and HR systems. SMEs need this foundation to keep operations running smoothly across devices, comply with data protection laws, and avoid manual re-entry of information. For example, a delivery manager can check vehicle status on their phone while a driver logs trip data on a tablet, and all records sync automatically to your accounting system.

Vehicle Registry.narrative: This family maintains a single source of truth for every vehicle you own or lease, tracks insurance coverage and claims, and manages the full lifecycle from purchase to disposal. SMEs need this to know exactly what assets you have, stay on top of insurance renewals, and make smart decisions about when to replace vehicles. For instance, when a vehicle is involved in an accident, you can instantly pull its insurance details and claims history; when a lease ends, the system reminds you to plan the replacement.

Driver & Safety.narrative: This family keeps detailed records of your drivers, monitors risky behaviours like speeding or harsh braking, and documents accidents to support insurance claims and safety improvements. SMEs need this to reduce accidents, lower insurance premiums, and protect themselves legally. For example, if a driver is consistently speeding, you can flag them for retraining; if an accident occurs, you have a complete incident record to share with insurers and investigators.

Maintenance & Workshop.narrative: This family schedules regular servicing based on time or mileage, creates and tracks repair work orders, and ensures vehicles stay roadworthy and under warranty. SMEs need this to avoid costly breakdowns, extend vehicle life, and maintain compliance with safety standards. For example, the system automatically reminds you when a vehicle is due for its 40,000 km service, and you can track the work order from request through completion and cost.

Operations & Logistics.narrative: This family tracks fuel consumption, vehicle location in real time, trip details, and helps you plan efficient routes and manage shared vehicle pools. SMEs need this to cut fuel costs, improve delivery speed, and maximise vehicle utilisation. For example, a logistics manager can see all vehicles on a live map, identify which ones are idling, and optimise a multi-stop delivery route to save time and fuel; drivers can self-book a pool vehicle through a mobile app.

Cost & Compliance.narrative: This family calculates the true cost of running each vehicle, generates reports and dashboards for decision-making, and ensures you meet Singapore's regulatory requirements like road tax, COE, and vehicle inspections. SMEs need this to control costs, demonstrate compliance to authorities, and make data-driven fleet decisions. For example, a monthly dashboard shows you which vehicles have the highest cost per kilometre, and an alert reminds you when a vehicle's inspection certificate is about to expire.
